description: Google Cloud Dataproc is a managed Apache Spark and Hadoop service for running batch, session, and cluster-based data processing workloads. It includes serverless and cluster-based interfaces for managing Dataproc resources and jobs.
summary: dataproc.googleapis.com exposes a public MCP endpoint at `https://dataproc.googleapis.com/mcp` and a documented Dataproc REST API at `https://dataproc.googleapis.com/v1`.
